summary: Full E2E lifecycle validation for Mr. Vinothkumar babu project completed successfully. Tested all role logins, accountant cashbook/cheque/petty cash management, site engineer mini cashbook and work orders, material requests, project status, and CRE dashboard. 95% backend tests passed (18/19 - 1 rate-limited).

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) on rapid sequential login requests during testing. Not a bug - expected behavior.
